feature: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[1] ORDER BY should return results in ascending order
scenarios.description: [1] ORDER BY should return results in ascending order
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN n.num AS prop
ORDER BY n.num

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[2] ORDER BY DESC should return results in descending order
scenarios.description: [2] ORDER BY DESC should return results in descending order
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN n.num AS prop
ORDER BY n.num DESC

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[3] Sort on aggregated function
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN n.division, max(n.age)
  ORDER BY max(n.age)

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[4] Support sort and distinct
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)
RETURN DISTINCT a
  ORDER BY a.name

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[5] Support ordering by a property after being distinct-ified
scenarios.description: [5] Support ordering by a property after being distinct-ified
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)-->(b)
RETURN DISTINCT b
  ORDER BY b.name

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[6] Count star should count everything in scope
scenarios.description: [6] Count star should count everything in scope
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)
RETURN a, count(*)
ORDER BY count(*)

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[7] Ordering with aggregation
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN n.name, count(*) AS foo
  ORDER BY n.name

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[8] Returning all variables with ordering
ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[9] Using aliased DISTINCT expression in ORDER BY
scenarios.description: [9] Using aliased DISTINCT expression in ORDER BY
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN DISTINCT n.id AS id
  ORDER BY id DESC

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[10] Returned columns do not change from using ORDER BY
scenarios.description: [10] Returned columns do not change from using ORDER BY
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN DISTINCT n
  ORDER BY n.id

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[11] Aggregates ordered by arithmetics
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:A), (b:X)
RETURN count(a) * 10 + count(b) * 5 AS x
ORDER BY x

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[12] Aggregation of named paths
scenarios.query:
MATCH p = (a)-[*]->(b)
RETURN collect(nodes(p)) AS paths, length(p) AS l
ORDER BY l

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[13] Fail when sorting on variable removed by DISTINCT
scenarios.description: [13] Fail when sorting on variable removed by DISTINCT
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)
RETURN DISTINCT a.name
  ORDER BY a.age

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy2 - Order by a single expression (order of projection)-[14] Fail on aggregation in ORDER BY after RETURN
scenarios.description: [14] Fail on aggregation in ORDER BY after RETURN
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN n.num1
  ORDER BY max(n.num2)
